description_long: This hammer features a robust, double-sided head with a geometric, angular design, predominantly colored in metallic gold with blue accents. The head is thick and blocky, with both striking faces appearing flat and wide, suitable for delivering powerful blows. The handle is long, straight, and dark, with gold bands and a textured grip section for enhanced handling and control. The overall construction suggests a heavy-duty tool, possibly for demolition or heavy construction tasks, with a visually striking color scheme that makes it easy to spot in an urban environment. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the head and shaft, with possible rubber or polymer grip enhancements. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments.
description: A heavy-duty, double-sided hammer with a gold and blue blocky head and a long, dark handle featuring gold accents and a textured grip.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical, double-sided gold head with blue central core and the straight handle extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, angular gold hammer head and the long, dark handle with gold bands.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the back face of the hammer head and the handle's end cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again displaying the blocky gold head and the handle's length and grip details.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, dark-colored handle with gold bands and a textured grip, likely made of steel with a rubber or polymer grip section.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided, blocky sledge-type head with flat striking faces, metallic gold color, and angular geometric design.
